tasks.label: api-smoke-invite
tasks.command: $login = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body '{"username":"admin","password":"admin"}'; $token = $login.data.token; if (-not $token) { throw 'login token missing' }; $invite = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/invite-code/create' -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"} -ContentType 'application/json' -Body '{"expireHours":24}'; $invite | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8

tasks.label: api-new-user-verify
tasks.command: $u='walkthrough_20260401190232'; $p=@{ username=$u; password='Passw0rd!' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $p; $token=$login.data.token; if (-not $token) { throw 'new user login failed' }; $headers=@{ Authorization=('Bearer ' + $token) }; $me=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/me' -Headers $headers; [pscustomobject]@{ loginCode=$login.code; meCode=$me.code; username=$me.data.user.username; roleCode=$me.data.user.roleCode; companyId=$me.data.user.companyId; accountStatus=$me.data.user.accountStatus } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6

tasks.label: debug-hash-mismatch-ids
tasks.command:
$sql=@'
WITH chain AS (
    SELECT c.id,c.company_id,c.current_hash,
           LOWER(SHA2(CONCAT_WS('|',
                COALESCE(CAST(c.company_id AS CHAR), ''),
                COALESCE(CAST(c.audit_log_id AS CHAR), ''),
                COALESCE(CAST(l.user_id AS CHAR), ''),
                COALESCE(l.operation, ''),
                COALESCE(CAST(FLOOR(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(CONVERT_TZ(l.operation_time, '+08:00', @@session.time_zone))) * 1000 AS CHAR), ''),
                COALESCE(l.input_overview, ''),
                COALESCE(l.output_overview, ''),
                COALESCE(l.result, ''),
                COALESCE(c.prev_hash, '')
           ), 256)) AS expected_current_hash
    FROM audit_hash_chain c JOIN audit_log l ON l.id=c.audit_log_id
    WHERE c.company_id=1
)
SELECT id, company_id, expected_current_hash, current_hash
FROM chain
WHERE current_hash <> expected_current_hash
ORDER BY id
LIMIT 20;
'@; docker compose exec -T mysql mysql --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --batch --raw --skip-column-names -uroot -proot aegisai -e $sql

tasks.label: debug-hash-prev-mismatch-count
tasks.command:
$sql=@'
WITH chain AS (
    SELECT c.id,c.company_id,COALESCE(c.prev_hash,'') AS prev_hash,
           COALESCE(LAG(c.current_hash) OVER (PARTITION BY c.company_id ORDER BY c.id), '') AS expected_prev_hash
    FROM audit_hash_chain c
    WHERE c.company_id=1
)
SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN prev_hash<>expected_prev_hash THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS prev_mismatch_count,
  COUNT(1) AS total
FROM chain;
'@; docker compose exec -T mysql mysql --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --batch --raw --skip-column-names -uroot -proot aegisai -e $sql

tasks.label: debug-chain-true-mismatch-count
tasks.command:
$sql=@'
WITH chain AS (
    SELECT c.id,c.company_id,
           COALESCE(c.prev_hash,'') AS prev_hash,
           COALESCE(c.current_hash,'') AS current_hash,
           COALESCE(LAG(c.current_hash) OVER (PARTITION BY c.company_id ORDER BY c.id), '') AS expected_prev_hash,
           LOWER(SHA2(CONCAT_WS('|',
               COALESCE(CAST(c.company_id AS CHAR), ''),
               COALESCE(CAST(c.audit_log_id AS CHAR), ''),
               COALESCE(CAST(l.user_id AS CHAR), ''),
               COALESCE(l.operation, ''),
               COALESCE(CAST(FLOOR(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(CONVERT_TZ(l.operation_time, '+08:00', @@session.time_zone))) * 1000 AS CHAR), ''),
               COALESCE(l.input_overview, ''),
               COALESCE(l.output_overview, ''),
               COALESCE(l.result, ''),
               COALESCE(c.prev_hash, '')
           ), 256)) AS expected_current_hash
    FROM audit_hash_chain c JOIN audit_log l ON l.id=c.audit_log_id
    WHERE c.company_id=1
)
SELECT COUNT(1) AS mismatches FROM chain WHERE prev_hash<>expected_prev_hash OR current_hash<>expected_current_hash;
'@; docker compose exec -T mysql mysql --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --batch --raw --skip-column-names -uroot -proot aegisai -e $sql

tasks.label: api-reliability-drill-check
tasks.command: $payload=@{ username='admin'; password='admin' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $payload; $token=$login.data.token; if(-not $token){ throw 'login failed' }; $headers=@{ Authorization=('Bearer ' + $token); 'Content-Type'='application/json' }; $body=@{ scenario='latency-and-failure-observe'; targetPath='/api/auth/registration-options'; injectPath='/api/non-existent-reliability-probe'; probeCount=4 } | ConvertTo-Json; $res=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/award/reliability/drill/run' -Headers $headers -Body $body; [pscustomobject]@{ code=$res.code; sloStatus=$res.data.sloStatus; availabilityMet=$res.data.detail.slo.availabilityMet; latencyMet=$res.data.detail.slo.latencyMet; recoveryMet=$res.data.detail.slo.recoveryMet; infraMet=$res.data.detail.slo.infraMet; infraAllHealthy=$res.data.detail.slo.infraAllHealthy; mysql=$res.data.detail.componentProbe.mysql; redis=$res.data.detail.componentProbe.redis; thirdParty=$res.data.detail.componentProbe.thirdPartyApi; criticalHealthy=$res.data.detail.componentProbe.criticalHealthy; degradeReason=$res.data.detail.componentProbe.degradeReason } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8

tasks.label: api-reliability-drill-check-2
tasks.command: $payload=@{ username='admin'; password='admin' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $payload; $token=$login.data.token; if(-not $token){ throw 'login failed' }; $headers=@{ Authorization=('Bearer ' + $token); 'Content-Type'='application/json' }; $body=@{ scenario='latency-and-failure-observe'; targetPath='/api/auth/registration-options'; injectPath='/api/non-existent-reliability-probe'; probeCount=4 } | ConvertTo-Json; $res=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/award/reliability/drill/run' -Headers $headers -Body $body; $res.data.detail.componentProbe | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8; [pscustomobject]@{ sloStatus=$res.data.sloStatus; availabilityMet=$res.data.detail.slo.availabilityMet; latencyMet=$res.data.detail.slo.latencyMet; recoveryMet=$res.data.detail.slo.recoveryMet; infraMet=$res.data.detail.slo.infraMet; infraAllHealthy=$res.data.detail.slo.infraAllHealthy } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8

tasks.label: api-reliability-drill-stability-5runs
tasks.command: $payload=@{ username='admin'; password='admin' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $payload; $token=$login.data.token; if(-not $token){ throw 'login failed' }; $headers=@{ Authorization=('Bearer ' + $token); 'Content-Type'='application/json' }; $rows=@(); 1..5 | ForEach-Object { $body=@{ scenario='latency-and-failure-observe'; targetPath='/api/auth/registration-options'; injectPath='/api/non-existent-reliability-probe'; probeCount=4 } | ConvertTo-Json; $res=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/award/reliability/drill/run' -Headers $headers -Body $body; $rows += [pscustomobject]@{ run=$_; sloStatus=$res.data.sloStatus; p95=$res.data.detail.baselineProbe.p95LatencyMs; availabilityMet=$res.data.detail.slo.availabilityMet; latencyMet=$res.data.detail.slo.latencyMet; infraMet=$res.data.detail.slo.infraMet; infraAllHealthy=$res.data.detail.slo.infraAllHealthy; degradeReason=$res.data.detail.componentProbe.degradeReason } }; $rows | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8; [pscustomobject]@{ total=5; breach=($rows | Where-Object { $_.sloStatus -ne 'met' }).Count } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4

tasks.label: api-reliability-drill-stability-5runs-v2
tasks.command: $payload=@{ username='admin'; password='admin' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $payload; $token=$login.data.token; if(-not $token){ throw 'login failed' }; $headers=@{ Authorization=('Bearer ' + $token); 'Content-Type'='application/json' }; $rows=@(); 1..5 | ForEach-Object { $body=@{ scenario='latency-and-failure-observe'; targetPath='/api/auth/registration-options'; injectPath='/api/non-existent-reliability-probe'; probeCount=4 } | ConvertTo-Json; $res=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/award/reliability/drill/run' -Headers $headers -Body $body; $rows += [pscustomobject]@{ run=$_; sloStatus=$res.data.sloStatus; availabilityMet=$res.data.detail.slo.availabilityMet; latencyMet=$res.data.detail.slo.latencyMet; infraMet=$res.data.detail.slo.infraMet; p95=$res.data.detail.baselineProbe.p95LatencyMs } }; $rows | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8; [pscustomobject]@{ total=5; breachCount=($rows | Where-Object { $_.sloStatus -eq 'breach' } | Measure-Object).Count } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4

tasks.label: api-reliability-drill-stability-5runs-v2b
tasks.command: $payload=@{ username='admin'; password='admin' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $payload; $token=$login.data.token; $headers=@{ Authorization=('Bearer ' + $token); 'Content-Type'='application/json' }; $rows=@(); foreach($i in 1..5){ $body=@{ scenario='latency-and-failure-observe'; targetPath='/api/auth/registration-options'; injectPath='/api/non-existent-reliability-probe'; probeCount=4 } | ConvertTo-Json; $res=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/award/reliability/drill/run' -Headers $headers -Body $body; $rows += [pscustomobject]@{ run=$i; sloStatus=$res.data.sloStatus; availabilityMet=$res.data.detail.slo.availabilityMet; latencyMet=$res.data.detail.slo.latencyMet; infraMet=$res.data.detail.slo.infraMet; p95=$res.data.detail.baselineProbe.p95LatencyMs } }; $rows | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8; [pscustomobject]@{ total=5; breachCount=($rows | Where-Object { $_.sloStatus -eq 'breach' } | Measure-Object).Count } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4

tasks.label: generate-immutable-manifest
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $runDir='docs/governance-readiness-evidence/run-20260403-005224'; $files=@("$runDir/governance-readiness-evidence-summary.json","$runDir/reliability-drill.json","$runDir/audit-hash-chain-build.json","$runDir/audit-hash-chain-verify.json","docs/identity-issue-regression-summary.json","docs/account-duty-segregation-summary.json"); $hashes = foreach ($f in $files) { $h = Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 -Path $f; [pscustomobject]@{ path=$f; sha256=$h.Hash.ToLower() } }; $manifest=[pscustomobject]@{ generatedAtUtc=(Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString('o'); runId='run-20260403-005224'; immutableManifestVersion='1.0'; items=$hashes }; $outPath="$runDir/immutable-handoff-manifest.json"; $manifest | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 | Set-Content -Path $outPath -Encoding utf8; Write-Output "WROTE:$outPath"

tasks.label: generate-immutable-manifest-2
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $files=@('docs/governance-readiness-evidence/run-20260403-005224/governance-readiness-evidence-summary.json','docs/governance-readiness-evidence/run-20260403-005224/reliability-drill.json','docs/governance-readiness-evidence/run-20260403-005224/audit-hash-chain-build.json','docs/governance-readiness-evidence/run-20260403-005224/audit-hash-chain-verify.json','docs/identity-issue-regression-summary.json','docs/account-duty-segregation-summary.json'); $hashes = foreach ($f in $files) { $h = Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 -Path $f; [pscustomobject]@{ path=$f; sha256=$h.Hash.ToLower() } }; $manifest=[pscustomobject]@{ generatedAtUtc=(Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString('o'); runId='run-20260403-005224'; immutableManifestVersion='1.0'; items=$hashes }; $outPath='docs/governance-readiness-evidence/run-20260403-005224/immutable-handoff-manifest.json'; $manifest | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 | Set-Content -Path $outPath -Encoding utf8; Write-Output ('WROTE:' + $outPath)

tasks.label: api-home-fixes-smoke
tasks.command: $payload=@{ username='admin'; password='admin' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $payload; $token=$login.data.token; if (-not $token) { throw 'login failed' }; $h=@{ Authorization=('Bearer ' + $token) }; $bootstrap=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/ai/monitor/bootstrap-trace' -Headers $h -ContentType 'application/json' -Body (@{ sampleSize=36 } | ConvertTo-Json); $verify=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/ai/monitor/logs/verify-chain' -Headers $h; $adver=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/ai/adversarial/run' -Headers $h -ContentType 'application/json' -Body (@{ scenario='real-threat-check'; rounds=10 } | ConvertTo-Json); $export=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/award/export' -Headers $h -ContentType 'application/json' -Body (@{ includePdf=$false; includeJson=$true } | ConvertTo-Json); [pscustomobject]@{ bootstrapLogs=$bootstrap.data.insertedAuditLogs; predicted=$bootstrap.data.predictedSamples; verifyRows=$verify.data.checkedRows; verifyPassed=$verify.data.passed; adverMode=$adver.data.mode; adverWinner=$adver.data.battle.winner; exportHasSig=[bool]$export.data.signature; exportWarning=$export.data.warning } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6

tasks.label: api-bootstrap-dump

tasks.label: api-governance-anomaly-smoke-new
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $adminLogin=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body (@{username='admin';password='admin'}|ConvertTo-Json); $reviewerLogin=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body (@{username='admin_reviewer';password='admin'}|ConvertTo-Json); $opsLogin=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body (@{username='admin_ops';password='admin'}|ConvertTo-Json); $adminToken=$adminLogin.data.token; $reviewerToken=$reviewerLogin.data.token; $opsToken=$opsLogin.data.token; $meReviewer=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/me' -Headers @{Authorization=('Bearer '+$reviewerToken)}; $meOps=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/me' -Headers @{Authorization=('Bearer '+$opsToken)}; $govPending=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/governance-change/page?page=1&pageSize=10&status=pending' -Headers @{Authorization=('Bearer '+$reviewerToken)}; $anPage1=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/anomaly/events?page=1&pageSize=10' -Headers @{Authorization=('Bearer '+$adminToken)}; $anPage2=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/anomaly/events?page=2&pageSize=20' -Headers @{Authorization=('Bearer '+$adminToken)}; [pscustomobject]@{reviewerRoleCode=$meReviewer.data.user.roleCode; opsRoleCode=$meOps.data.user.roleCode; pendingTotal=$govPending.data.total; pendingListCount=($govPending.data.list|Measure-Object).Count; anomalyTotal=$anPage1.data.total; anomalyPage1Count=($anPage1.data.events|Measure-Object).Count; anomalyPage2Count=($anPage2.data.events|Measure-Object).Count; anomalyPage1Page=$anPage1.data.page; anomalyPage2Page=$anPage2.data.page; anomalyPage1Size=$anPage1.data.pageSize; anomalyPage2Size=$anPage2.data.pageSize } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8

tasks.label: api-governance-reviewer-workflow-smoke
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $adminLogin=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body (@{username='admin';password='admin'}|ConvertTo-Json); $reviewerLogin=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body (@{username='admin_reviewer';password='admin'}|ConvertTo-Json); $adminToken=$adminLogin.data.token; $reviewerToken=$reviewerLogin.data.token; $code=('SMOKE_ROLE_' + [DateTimeOffset]::UtcNow.ToUnixTimeSeconds()); $payload = @{ name='Smoke Role'; code=$code; description='reviewer flow smoke' } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; $submitBody = @{ module='ROLE'; action='ADD'; payloadJson=$payload; confirmPassword='admin' } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; $submit = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/governance-change/submit' -Headers @{Authorization=('Bearer '+$adminToken)} -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $submitBody; $requestId=$submit.data.id; if(-not $requestId){ throw 'submit requestId missing' }; $pending = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/governance-change/page?page=1&pageSize=20&status=pending' -Headers @{Authorization=('Bearer '+$reviewerToken)}; $target = $pending.data.list | Where-Object { $_.id -eq $requestId } | Select-Object -First 1; $approveBody = @{ requestId=$requestId; approve=$false; note='smoke reject'; confirmPassword='admin' } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; $review = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/governance-change/approve' -Headers @{Authorization=('Bearer '+$reviewerToken)} -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $approveBody; [pscustomobject]@{ submittedRequestId=$requestId; foundInReviewerPending=([bool]$target); reviewerPageCount=($pending.data.list|Measure-Object).Count; reviewResultStatus=$review.data.status; reviewApproverRoleCode=$review.data.approverRoleCode } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8

tasks.label: api-anomaly-pagination-smoke-generated
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $adminLogin=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body (@{username='admin';password='admin'}|ConvertTo-Json); $token=$adminLogin.data.token; $headers=@{Authorization=('Bearer '+$token)}; for($i=1;$i -le 35;$i++){ $body=@{ employee_id='employee1'; department='研发'; ai_service='ChatGPT'; hour_of_day=($i % 24); day_of_week=($i % 7); message_length=(1200 + $i*30); topic_code=1; session_duration_min=(15 + ($i % 40)); is_new_service=0 } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/anomaly/check' -Headers $headers -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body | Out-Null }; $p10_1=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/anomaly/events?page=1&pageSize=10' -Headers $headers; $p10_2=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/anomaly/events?page=2&pageSize=10' -Headers $headers; $p20_1=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/anomaly/events?page=1&pageSize=20' -Headers $headers; $p50_1=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/anomaly/events?page=1&pageSize=50' -Headers $headers; [pscustomobject]@{ total=$p10_1.data.total; p10_page1_count=($p10_1.data.events|Measure-Object).Count; p10_page2_count=($p10_2.data.events|Measure-Object).Count; p20_page1_count=($p20_1.data.events|Measure-Object).Count; p50_page1_count=($p50_1.data.events|Measure-Object).Count; p10_page1_page=$p10_1.data.page; p10_page2_page=$p10_2.data.page; p20_page1_size=$p20_1.data.pageSize; p50_page1_size=$p50_1.data.pageSize } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8

tasks.label: debug-role-company-scope-check
tasks.command: $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body (@{username='admin';password='admin'}|ConvertTo-Json); $t=$login.data.token; $roles=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/roles?page=1&pageSize=200' -Headers @{Authorization=('Bearer '+$t)}; $items=@($roles.data.list); [pscustomobject]@{ total=$roles.data.total; listCount=$items.Count; companyIds=($items | ForEach-Object {$_.companyId} | Sort-Object -Unique) -join ','; sample=($items | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object {"$($_.id):$($_.code):$($_.companyId)"}) -join '; ' } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5

tasks.label: debug-role-company-scope-check-2
tasks.command: $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body (@{username='admin';password='admin'}|ConvertTo-Json); $t=$login.data.token; $roles=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/roles?page=1&pageSize=200' -Headers @{Authorization=('Bearer '+$t)}; $items=@($roles.data.list); $sample=@(); foreach($r in ($items | Select-Object -First 8)) { $sample += ($r.id.ToString() + ':' + $r.code + ':' + $r.companyId.ToString()) }; [pscustomobject]@{ total=$roles.data.total; listCount=$items.Count; companyIds=($items | ForEach-Object {$_.companyId} | Sort-Object -Unique) -join ','; sample=($sample -join '; ') } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5

tasks.label: debug-roles-topkeys
tasks.command: $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body (@{username='admin';password='admin'}|ConvertTo-Json); $t=$login.data.token; $roles=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/roles?page=1&pageSize=10' -Headers @{Authorization=('Bearer '+$t)}; [pscustomobject]@{ topKeys=((($roles | Get-Member -MemberType NoteProperty).Name) -join ','); code=$roles.code; msg=$roles.msg; hasData=([bool]$roles.data); dataKeys=((($roles.data | Get-Member -MemberType NoteProperty).Name) -join ','); current=$roles.data.current; pages=$roles.data.pages; total=$roles.data.total; listCount=@($roles.data.list).Count } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5

tasks.label: debug-mybatis-pagination-class

tasks.label: debug-role-paging-after-fix
tasks.command: $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body (@{username='admin';password='admin'}|ConvertTo-Json); $t=$login.data.token; $r1=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/roles?page=1&pageSize=10' -Headers @{Authorization=('Bearer '+$t)}; $r2=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/roles?page=2&pageSize=10' -Headers @{Authorization=('Bearer '+$t)}; [pscustomobject]@{ total=$r1.data.total; p1Count=@($r1.data.list).Count; p2Count=@($r2.data.list).Count; p1Current=$r1.data.current; p2Current=$r2.data.current; companyIds=(@($r1.data.list)+@($r2.data.list) | ForEach-Object {$_.companyId} | Sort-Object -Unique) -join ',' } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6

tasks.label: debug-sensitive-scan-paging-after-fix
tasks.command: $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body (@{username='admin';password='admin'}|ConvertTo-Json); $t=$login.data.token; $s1=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/sensitive-scan/list?page=1&pageSize=10' -Headers @{Authorization=('Bearer '+$t)}; $s2=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/sensitive-scan/list?page=2&pageSize=20' -Headers @{Authorization=('Bearer '+$t)}; [pscustomobject]@{ total=$s1.data.total; p1Count=@($s1.data.list).Count; p2Count=@($s2.data.list).Count; p1Current=$s1.data.current; p2Current=$s2.data.current; p1Pages=$s1.data.pages; p2Pages=$s2.data.pages } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6

tasks.label: api-user-page-dump-now
tasks.command: $payload=@{ username='admin'; password='admin' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $payload; $token=$login.data.token; $headers=@{ Authorization=('Bearer ' + $token) }; $res=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/user/page?page=1&pageSize=50' -Headers $headers; $res | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10

tasks.label: api-user-quality-baseline
tasks.command: $payload=@{ username='admin'; password='admin' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $payload; $token=$login.data.token; if(-not $token){ throw 'admin login failed' }; $h=@{ Authorization=('Bearer '+$token) }; $list=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/user/list' -Headers $h; $users=@($list.data); $missing=@($users | Where-Object { -not $_.realName -or [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace([string]$_.realName) }); $dup=@($users | Group-Object realName | Where-Object { $_.Name -and $_.Count -gt 1 } | Select-Object Name,Count); $roleMap=@{}; $roles=(Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/roles?page=1&pageSize=300' -Headers $h).data.list; foreach($r in $roles){ $roleMap[[string]$r.id]=$r.code }; $invalidRole=@($users | Where-Object { $_.roleId -and -not $roleMap.ContainsKey([string]$_.roleId) }); $adminUser=$users | Where-Object { $_.username -eq 'admin' } | Select-Object -First 1; [pscustomobject]@{ total=$users.Count; missingRealName=$missing.Count; duplicateRealNameGroups=$dup.Count; invalidRoleIdUsers=$invalidRole.Count; adminRoleId=$adminUser.roleId; adminRoleCode=($roleMap[[string]$adminUser.roleId]); sampleMissing=($missing | Select-Object -First 5 username,realName,nickname,roleId); sampleInvalidRole=($invalidRole | Select-Object -First 5 username,roleId,companyId,realName) } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10

tasks.label: api-user-quality-duplicates-detail
tasks.command: $payload=@{ username='admin'; password='admin' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $payload; $token=$login.data.token; $h=@{ Authorization=('Bearer '+$token) }; $users=@((Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/user/list' -Headers $h).data); $dups=@($users | Group-Object realName | Where-Object { $_.Name -and $_.Count -gt 1 } | Sort-Object Count -Descending); $detail=@(); foreach($g in $dups){ $detail += [pscustomobject]@{ realName=$g.Name; count=$g.Count; users=($g.Group | Select-Object -First 8 username,accountStatus,department,roleId) } }; $detail | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8

tasks.label: api-invite-list-active-now
tasks.command: $payload=@{ username='admin'; password='admin' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $payload; $token=$login.data.token; $headers=@{ Authorization=('Bearer ' + $token) }; $res=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/invite-code/list?page=1&pageSize=20&status=active' -Headers $headers; $res | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10

tasks.label: run-user-management-cleanup-sql-20260405
tasks.command: Get-Content -Raw '.\docs\user-management-cleanup-2026-04-05.sql' | docker compose exec -T mysql mysql --default-character-set=utf8mb4 -uroot -proot aegisai

tasks.label: run-user-management-cleanup-sql-20260405-v2
tasks.command:
$sql=@'
UPDATE sys_user
SET real_name = CONCAT(''Duty Pending User-'', username),
    nickname = CONCAT(''DutyPending-'', username),
    update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE company_id = 1
  AND username LIKE ''duty_pending_%'';

UPDATE sys_user
SET real_name = CONCAT(''Walkthrough User-'', username),
    nickname = CONCAT(''Walkthrough-'', username),
    update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE company_id = 1
  AND username LIKE ''walkthrough_%'';

UPDATE sys_user
SET real_name = CONCAT(''员工-'', username),
    nickname = CONCAT(''员工-'', username),
    update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE company_id = 1
  AND username IN (''employee_2'',''employee2'',''employee_3'',''employee3'');
'@; $sql | docker compose exec -T mysql mysql --default-character-set=utf8mb4 -uroot -proot aegisai

tasks.label: api-user-duplicate-count-quick
tasks.command: $payload=@{ username='admin'; password='admin' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $payload; $token=$login.data.token; $h=@{ Authorization=('Bearer '+$token) }; $users=@((Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/user/list' -Headers $h).data); $dups=@($users | Group-Object realName | Where-Object { $_.Name -and $_.Count -gt 1 }); [pscustomobject]@{ duplicateGroups=$dups.Count; top=($dups | Sort-Object Count -Descending | Select-Object -First 8 Name,Count) } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8

tasks.label: cleanup-delete-regression-users-20260405
tasks.command:
$sql=@'
DELETE FROM sys_user
WHERE company_id = 1
  AND (
    username LIKE 'duty_%'
    OR username LIKE 'walkthrough_%'
  );
'@; $sql | docker compose exec -T mysql mysql --default-character-set=utf8mb4 -uroot -proot aegisai

tasks.label: api-deepseek-source-check
tasks.command: $payload=@{ username='admin'; password='admin' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $payload; $token=$login.data.token; if (-not $token) { throw 'login failed' }; $h=@{ Authorization=('Bearer ' + $token) }; $deep=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/dashboard/ai-hub/deepseek-analysis?scopeLevel=company' -Headers $h; [pscustomobject]@{ code=$deep.code; source=$deep.data.source; model=$deep.data.model; len=([string]$deep.data.analysis).Length; msg=$deep.msg } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6

tasks.label: probe-frontend-login-post
args: $body = @{ username = 'admin'; password = 'admin' } | ConvertTo-Json; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body; Write-Output ('OK code=' + $r.code) } catch { if ($_.Exception.Response) { $status = [int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode; $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream()); $txt = $reader.ReadToEnd(); Write-Output ('FAIL status=' + $status); Write-Output $txt } else { Write-Output ('FAIL ' + $_.Exception.Message) } }

tasks.label: probe-frontend-login-post-irm
args: $body = '{\"username\":\"admin\",\"password\":\"admin\"}'; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body; Write-Output ('OK:' + $r.code) } catch { if ($_.Exception.Response) { $status=[int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode; Write-Output ('FAIL:' + $status) } else { Write-Output ('FAIL:' + $_.Exception.Message) } }

tasks.label: probe-frontend-api-post2
args: $payload = @{username="admin";password="admin"} | ConvertTo-Json; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login -ContentType application/json -Body $payload; Write-Output $r.code

tasks.label: verify-windows-installer-signature-v2
args: $tmp = Join-Path $env:TEMP "aegis_client_verify.exe"; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/download/client/windows" -OutFile $tmp -TimeoutSec 30; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($tmp); Write-Output ("SIZE=" + $bytes.Length); if ($bytes.Length -ge 2) { Write-Output (("SIG={0:X2} {1:X2}" -f $bytes[0], $bytes[1])) } else { Write-Output "SIG=<short>" } } finally { if (Test-Path $tmp) { Remove-Item $tmp -Force } }

tasks.label: probe-electron-exe-sig
args: $p = (Get-ChildItem -Path electron/dist -Filter *.exe | Select-Object -First 1).FullName; Write-Output ("SRC_PATH=" + $p); $b = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($p); if($b.Length -ge 2){ Write-Output (("SRC_SIG={0:X2} {1:X2}" -f $b[0], $b[1])) } else { Write-Output "SRC_SIG=<short>" }

tasks.label: probe-electron-exe-sig-v2
tasks.command: $p = (Get-ChildItem -Path electron/dist -Filter *.exe | Select-Object -First 1).FullName; Write-Output ('SRC_PATH=' + $p); $b = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($p); if($b.Length -ge 2){ Write-Output (('SRC_SIG={0:X2} {1:X2}' -f $b[0], $b[1])) } else { Write-Output 'SRC_SIG=<short>' }

tasks.label: check-host-jar-embedded-installer-sig
tasks.command: Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $jar='backend/target/AegisAI-backend-0.1.0.jar'; if(-not (Test-Path $jar)){ Write-Output 'JAR_MISSING'; exit 1 }; $zip=[System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead((Resolve-Path $jar)); try { $entry=$zip.GetEntry('BOOT-INF/classes/clients/AegisClient-Setup-1.0.0-x64.exe'); if($null -eq $entry){ Write-Output 'ENTRY_MISSING'; exit 1 }; $s=$entry.Open(); try { $b=New-Object byte[] 2; $read=$s.Read($b,0,2); if($read -lt 2){ Write-Output 'JAR_SIG=<short>' } else { Write-Output (('JAR_SIG={0:X2} {1:X2}' -f $b[0],$b[1])) } } finally { $s.Dispose() } } finally { $zip.Dispose() }

tasks.label: check-host-jar-embedded-installer-sig-v2
tasks.command: Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $jar='backend/target/AegisAI-backend-0.1.0.jar'; $zip=[System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead((Resolve-Path $jar)); try { $entry=$zip.GetEntry('BOOT-INF/classes/clients/AegisClient-Setup-1.0.0-x64.exe'); if($null -eq $entry){ Write-Output 'ENTRY_MISSING'; exit 1 }; $s=$entry.Open(); try { $b=New-Object byte[] 2; $read=$s.Read($b,0,2); if($read -lt 2){ Write-Output 'JAR_SIG=<short>' } else { Write-Output (('JAR_SIG={0:X2} {1:X2}' -f $b[0],$b[1])) } } finally { $s.Dispose() } } finally { $zip.Dispose() }

tasks.label: hot-swap-backend-jar-and-restart
tasks.command: docker cp backend/target/AegisAI-backend-0.1.0.jar aegisai-backend:/app/backend/target/AegisAI-backend-0.1.0.jar; docker restart aegisai-backend

tasks.label: verify-endpoint-signature-after-hotswap
tasks.command: docker ps --filter name=aegisai-backend --format "STATUS={{.Status}} PORTS={{.Ports}}"; $tmp = Join-Path $env:TEMP 'aegis_client_verify.exe'; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/download/client/windows" -OutFile $tmp -TimeoutSec 30; $b = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($tmp); Write-Output ('DL_SIZE=' + $b.Length); if($b.Length -ge 2){ Write-Output (('DL_SIG={0:X2} {1:X2}' -f $b[0], $b[1])) } else { Write-Output 'DL_SIG=<short>' } } finally { if(Test-Path $tmp){ Remove-Item $tmp -Force } }
